variants.title: AI Sales Pipeline Acceleration
variants.prompt: Premium abstract cinematic website hero loop for AI sales pipeline acceleration. Use only unmarked metallic spheres, plain geometric nodes, and clean light paths on a dark executive surface. Brass and cool-blue signals move through opportunity clusters and converge into a disciplined growth machine. Left side has quiet dark negative space for headline copy. Absolutely no readable text, no tiny labels, no letters, no numbers, no glyphs, no logos, no UI screenshots, no people, no faces. Elegant, practical, high-trust, loopable, 16:9.
